infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GlowDermics uses your camera to take a skin scan for AI analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GlowDermics accesses your photos so you can upload a skin scan image.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GlowDermics saves your skin scan results to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: GlowDermics uses Face ID to protect your skin health data.

plugins.cameraPermission: GlowDermics uses your camera to take a skin scan photo for AI analysis.

plugins.photosPermission: GlowDermics accesses your photo library so you can upload a skin photo for analysis.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow GlowDermics to use Face ID to secure your profile.
